heading: What a permitted trip actually provides

cards.title: Permits, handled for you
cards.text: We arrange the required permission to visit and camp on the specific island — not something you need to sort out yourself.

cards.title: Gear
cards.text: Tents, sleeping equipment, and basic camp setup are provided by the operator — you don't need to bring your own camping gear.

cards.title: Food and water
cards.text: Meals and drinking water are typically included and prepared on-site or brought over — confirmed in your quote before you go.

cards.title: Safety and transfer
cards.text: A licensed boat handles transfer to and from the island, with safety equipment and a guide who knows the specific island's conditions.
